sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2025-05-23 18:34
- Distance: 11.4 km
- Moving time: 1:19:37
- Elapsed time: 1:20:33
- Elevation gain: 161.8 m
- Average heart rate: 154.2 bpm
- Max heart rate: 176 bpm
- Average watts: 168.7 W
- Average speed: 8.6 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `153.9 bpm`, ranging from `149.9` to `163.8 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `150.8 bpm` and second-half average HR was `158.5 bpm` (+7.7 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `157.9 spm`, with a working range of `153.0` to `162.8 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `157.8 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `158.0 spm` (+0.2 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `7:00 /km` across `11.372 km` in `1:19:37` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:50 /km` and second-half pace was `7:11 /km` (+21 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `154.2 bpm` average and `176 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `150.8 bpm` in the first half and `157.3 bpm` in the second (+6.5 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `1:19:37` out of `1:20:33` elapsed (98.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `25` stop segments and `2.7%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `191.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.8 m` and `69.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `63.8 m` in the first half and `127.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
